metadata.title: Seedance 2.0 - Multi-Modal AI Video Creation Workspace
metadata.description: Build cinematic AI videos with text, image, video, and audio references in one workspace. Seedance 2.0 is designed for controllable, production-ready multi-modal generation.
metadata.keywords: seedance 2, ai video generator, multi modal video ai, image to video, text to video, reference video generation, ai video workspace

hero.badge: Multi-Modal Input • Precision Motion • Video Extension
hero.title: Experience true
hero.subtitle: Combine images, videos, audio, and natural language in a single cinematic workspace designed for controllable Seedance-style generation.
hero.tool_subtitle: Stage the workspace first, then wire the live generation pipeline.

uploader.title: Upload Your Image
uploader.drop_zone: Drag & drop your image here, or click to browse
uploader.privacy_notice: Your image is used only for this generation and is never used to train our own models.
uploader.error_invalid: Invalid file type. Please upload an image.
uploader.error_size: File too large. Maximum size is 15MB.
uploader.error_demo: Failed to load the demo image. Please try another one.

anime_editor.panel_subtitle: Pick a style and tune the details.
anime_editor.prompt_placeholder: E.g., soft lighting, clean background, cute expression…
anime_editor.signin_gate_title: Unlock free credits and HD watermark-free downloads
anime_editor.signin_gate_desc: Create your account to claim free generation credits and save every anime artwork you make.
anime_editor.error_signin_required: Your free try is ready. Create an account in seconds to generate now.
anime_editor.disclaimer: Results vary by photo quality and chosen style.
anime_editor.try_other_styles: Love this? Try these styles next:

home_static.f1_desc: Anchor the output with images, clips, motion, and audio instead of relying on prompt luck.
home_static.f2_desc: Open the site and start staging real production inputs immediately.
home_static.f3_desc: Designed to grow into queued jobs, status polling, and resumable generation.
home_static.styles_title: A controllable model needs legible capabilities
home_static.styles_subtitle: The homepage should communicate what Seedance 2 does best: reference handling, motion precision, extension, and audio-aware generation.
home_static.use_title: Built for creators who think in references
home_static.use_subtitle: From marketing teams to previs artists, the product should feel closer to a workstation than a gimmick.
home_static.u1_desc: Reuse proven shot language, product framing, and branded motion patterns.
home_static.u2_desc: Prototype camera movement, scene continuity, and visual timing before production.
home_static.u3_desc: Turn trends, music, and visual references into repeatable content pipelines.
home_static.faq_subtitle: This branch already stages the production UX before the provider integration lands.
home_static.faq1_a: Start with stills, reference clips, and optional audio so the model has concrete material to follow.
home_static.faq2_a: Use natural language to explain how each asset should influence motion, framing, pacing, and continuity.
home_static.faq3_a: Once the async job system is wired, users can generate, extend, and refine without restarting the entire flow.
home_static.faq4_a: Assets should be stored in project-scoped buckets and forwarded only to the selected generation provider. Privacy details belong in the final policy.
home_static.cta_title: Ready to turn this scaffold into a real Seedance product?
home_static.cta_subtitle: The product shell is in place. Next we wire storage, async jobs, credits, and the live model.

landing.how_step1: Upload a clear photo (portraits work best).
landing.how_step2: Choose a style and adjust anime intensity.
landing.how_step3: Generate and download your anime image.

footer.tagline: Multi-modal AI video creation workspace for controllable cinematic output
footer.built_by: Built for creators shipping moving images

Contact.meta_desc: Reach Seedance 2.0 support for workflow questions, billing, privacy requests, or rollout updates.
Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.p1: If you have questions about results, billing, privacy, or account issues, we are here to help. We keep this page simple so you always have a clear place to reach support.
Contact.support_desc: For help with orders, failed generations, refunds, or data requests, email us here:
Contact.p2: To help us resolve your issue faster, include your account email and a short description of what happened.
Contact.p3: We usually reply within 24 to 48 hours. If your request is about uploaded images or account data, mention that directly so we can route it correctly.

Pricing.title: One page, two buying behaviors, clear upgrade logic.
Pricing.subtitle: Keep the low-friction buy-out packs for first-time testing, then make the subscription math obviously better for serious video production.
Pricing.artist_anchor: Compared with traditional storyboarding, motion tests, or repeated freelance editing rounds, a strong Seedance subscription should feel like instant leverage rather than just another SaaS bill.
Pricing.refill_subtitle: Use top-up packs for campaign tests, or unlock the subscription for repeatable high-volume video work.
